_note: Vendor positioning. 2026-Q2 snapshot. Microsoft pages disclose Sush's employer.

items.name: Microsoft
items.primaryJob: Enterprise agent platform (Copilot Studio · Foundry · Agent 365)

products.value: Copilot Studio · Foundry · Connectors · Agent 365 · Declarative Agents

lockIn.note: Strong if you're building inside M365 / Azure. Connectors / Foundry resources are portable in concept; in practice, migration is non-trivial.

mcpStance.note: Microsoft has shipped MCP support across Copilot Studio + VS Code + Azure AI.

disclosure.note: Sush is a Copilot Solution Engineer at Microsoft NZ. The take here is independent — not Microsoft's official position.

lagsAt: Brand / pace lag vs Anthropic on protocol-led features
axes.verdict: Default if your org already runs on M365 / Azure and you need the governance story.

products.value: Claude · MCP · Skills · Computer Use · Agent SDK

lockIn.note: MCP is open. Claude API is single-vendor; switching costs at the model layer are real but architectural lock-in is modest.

mcpStance.note: Anthropic introduced MCP in November 2024. Strongest first-class support.

axes.verdict: Default for builders who care about protocols, plain behaviour, and cross-vendor interop.

items.name: OpenAI
items.primaryJob: Platform + reach (ChatGPT · Apps SDK · Operator · Agents SDK)

products.value: GPTs · Apps SDK · Agents SDK · Operator · Realtime API

lockIn.note: Apps SDK builds on MCP-style servers (good for portability), but ChatGPT-specific UI hooks are platform-locked.

mcpStance.note: Apps SDK uses MCP-style server protocol; ChatGPT exposes them as apps.

lagsAt: Reasoning effort settings can be opaque
axes.verdict: Default if your audience lives in ChatGPT, or you need image / audio / realtime out of the box.

products.value: Gemini · Vertex AI Agents · A2A · Notebook LM · AI Studio

lockIn.note: Vertex resources are GCP-locked. Gemini API is portable in concept; integrations into Workspace are platform-locked.

mcpStance.note: Vertex AI Agents adopted MCP. A2A is Google's protocol for agent-to-agent communication, complementary to MCP.

lagsAt: Smaller MCP server catalog than Anthropic-led ecosystem
axes.verdict: Default when your task is genuinely long-context / multimodal, or you live in Google Workspace.
